MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento for Plaintiff Frank Sweis, who is present.
Floyd Chapman, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Khaled Elsayed, who is present.

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 555 Height St. Unit C, San Francisco, CA. 94117. See scanned document. Trial date of 12/29/08 is vacated.

JPT Ora Prochovnick, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
